title: cleyera vaccinioides
intro: Cleyera vaccinioides, also known as Japanese cleyera or Japanese evergreen cleyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. Native to East Asia, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cleyera vaccinioides include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
